inputs.label: Quantity (therms)
inputs.businessContext: Amount of energy in therms to be converted to BTU.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of energy in therms to be converted to BTU.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from therms to BTU (1 therm = 100,000 BTU).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion factor from therms to BTU (1 therm = 100,000 BTU).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Therm'den BTU'ya standart dönüşüm faktörü (1 therm = 100.000 BTU).

inputs.label: Energy Content Adjustment
inputs.businessContext: Adjustment to the conversion factor for fuel-specific energy content variations, if any.

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjustment to the conversion factor for fuel-specific energy content variations, if any.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıta özgü enerji içeriği farklılıkları için dönüşüm faktörüne yapılan ayar (varsa).

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places to round the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places to round the output.

inputs.label: Output Unit Scale Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor to convert BTU to desired output unit (e.g., 1 for BTU, 1e-6 for MMBTU).

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor to convert BTU to desired output unit (e.g., 1 for BTU, 1e-6 for MMBTU).
businessContext_i18n.tr: BTU'yu istenen çıktı birimine dönüştüren faktör (ör. BTU için 1, MMBTU için 1e-6).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
